Details List.SourceString: Low-scoring parts in Battle Stage are adjusted upward so any instrument can compete.
Details List.LocalizedString: Low-scoring parts in Battle Stage are adjusted upward so any instrument can compete.

Details List.SourceString: However, more complex parts can still achieve higher max scores.
Details List.LocalizedString: However, more complex parts can still achieve higher max scores.

Details List.SourceString: Compare your part’s potential score vs the most difficult part using the "Max Score" bar.
Details List.LocalizedString: Compare your part’s potential score vs the most difficult part using the "Max Score" bar.

Details List.SourceString: Playing accurately is more important than picking the hardest part.
Details List.LocalizedString: Playing accurately is more important than picking the hardest part.
